title: Verilog parser crash on 100_000.0
body:
Repro: 

``` verilog
module foo(); wire a = 100_000.0; endmodule
```

This is legal according to http://verilog.renerta.com/mobile/source/vrg00040.htm, but crashes the parser:

```
ERROR: Assert `*q == 0' failed in frontends/verilog/verilog_parser.y:1347.
```
